name: Bran Muffins-in-Waiting
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the warm water with 1 cup of cereal.
2. Sift together the flour and baking soda.
3. In a large bowl, beat the butter until creamy. Add sugar half a cup at a time, beating after each addition.
4. Blend in the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Scrape the sides of the bowl often.
5. Stir in the flour mixture half a cup at a time, alternating with the butter/sour milk added half a cup at a time also.
6. Stir in the soaked bran and the remaining bran cereal.
7. Cover and store in the refrigerator for at least 6 hours before baking.
8. To bake the muffins, preheat the oven to 400 degrees F. Grease 2 1/2-inch muffin cups. Stir the batter gently. Fill each muffin cup with about 1/4 cup of batter.
9. Bake for about 20 minutes, or until nicely browned. Remove from the pan and serve hot with butter.
10. Makes 6 cups batter or about 24 2 1/2-inch muffins.
